description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-fedora that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, and on merge groups to main. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs for the same pull request or reference, except for the main branch. Use a job that runs in a Fedora container on an ubuntu-latest VM, installing git, checking out the repository with submodules, installing dependencies, setting up ccache, building p4c, and running tests with ctest.
